translation: May noble thoughts come to us from every side.

text: arise, awake, and stop not till the goal is reached
author: Swami Vivekananda (paraphrase)

text: yaṃ hi na vyathayanty ete puruṣaṃ puruṣarṣabha
translation: O best among men, one whom these do not disturb — that steady person is fit for liberation.
author: Śrī Kṛṣṇa

text: vāṇī guṇānuvādaṃ vā tathālāpaka eva ca
translation: Speech that praises virtue and conversation that uplifts — this is the way of the wise.
author: Thiruvaḷḷuvar
